# Paylix SDK — Complete Reference
# Version: 0.2.0
# Last updated: 2026-04-13
#
# Paylix is an open-source, self-hostable crypto payment platform.
# Accept USDC payments and subscriptions on Base with TypeScript.
# Funds go directly to your wallet — no custodial intermediary.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @paylix/sdk
# or
pnpm add @paylix/sdk
# or
yarn add @paylix/sdk
```

## Initialization

```typescript
import { Paylix, webhooks, NETWORKS } from "@paylix/sdk";

const paylix = new Paylix({
  apiKey: "sk_live_...",           // Secret API key from dashboard
  network: "base",                 // "base" (mainnet) or "base-sepolia" (testnet)
  backendUrl: "https://paylix.example.com", // Your Paylix backend URL
});
```

## SDK Methods

### paylix.createCheckout(params)

Creates a one-time payment checkout session.

```typescript
const { checkoutUrl, checkoutId } = await paylix.createCheckout({
  productId: "prod_abc123",              // required — product ID from dashboard
  customerId: "cust_xyz",                // optional — your customer identifier
  successUrl: "https://example.com/ok",  // optional — redirect after payment
  cancelUrl: "https://example.com/cancel", // optional — redirect on cancel
  metadata: { orderId: "42" },           // optional — arbitrary key-value pairs
  networkKey: "base-sepolia",            // optional — pre-lock network
  tokenSymbol: "USDC",                   // optional — pre-lock token
});
// Returns: { checkoutUrl: string; checkoutId: string }
// Redirect user to checkoutUrl to complete payment.
```

### paylix.createSubscription(params)

Creates a recurring subscription checkout session.

```typescript
const { checkoutUrl, checkoutId, trialEndsAt } = await paylix.createSubscription({
  productId: "prod_monthly_pro",         // required — subscription product ID
  customerId: "cust_xyz",                // optional
  successUrl: "https://example.com/welcome", // optional
  cancelUrl: "https://example.com/pricing",  // optional
  metadata: { plan: "pro" },             // optional
  networkKey: "base-sepolia",            // optional — pre-lock network
  tokenSymbol: "USDC",                   // optional — pre-lock token
});
// Returns: { checkoutUrl: string; checkoutId: string; trialEndsAt: string | null }
```

### paylix.cancelSubscription(params)

Cancels a subscription on-chain via the Paylix relayer. The merchant
signs nothing and pays no gas — the Paylix backend submits the
SubscriptionManager cancel transaction on behalf of the merchant wallet
on file, then updates the database. The promise only resolves after the
on-chain transaction is mined.

```typescript
await paylix.cancelSubscription({
  subscriptionId: "sub_abc123", // required
});
// Returns: void
```

### paylix.updateSubscriptionWallet(params)

Requests a wallet migration for a subscription. The new wallet owner
must call acceptSubscriptionWalletUpdate on the SubscriptionManager
contract to complete the migration.

```typescript
await paylix.updateSubscriptionWallet({
  subscriptionId: "sub_abc123",                              // required
  newWallet: "0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678",   // required — new paying wallet
});
// Returns: void
```

### paylix.verifyPayment(params)

Verifies a payment's on-chain status. Always verify server-side before fulfilling.

```typescript
const result = await paylix.verifyPayment({
  paymentId: "pay_abc123", // required
});
// Returns:
// {
//   verified: boolean;    — true if confirmed on-chain
//   amount: number;       — amount in USDC cents (1000 = $10.00)
//   fee: number;          — platform fee in USDC cents
//   txHash: string;       — on-chain transaction hash
//   chain: string;        — "base" or "base-sepolia"
//   customerId: string;
//   productId: string;
//   status: "confirmed" | "pending" | "failed";
//   metadata: Record<string, string>;
//   livemode: boolean;
// }
```

### paylix.listPayments(params?)

Lists payments for the authenticated organization. Supports filtering by
customer ID, payment status, and metadata key-value pairs. Every result
includes an embedded `customer` object with the customer's email, name,
and wallet address.

```typescript
// All payments (most recent 100)
const payments = await paylix.listPayments();

// Filter by customer ID
const customerPayments = await paylix.listPayments({
  customerId: "cust_xyz",
});

// Filter by metadata — find payments for a specific user in your system
const userPayments = await paylix.listPayments({
  metadata: { userId: "user_123" },
});

// Combine filters
const confirmed = await paylix.listPayments({
  customerId: "cust_xyz",
  status: "confirmed",
  metadata: { orderId: "42" },
  limit: 25,
});

// Access customer info
for (const p of payments) {
  console.log(p.id, p.amount, p.customer.email, p.customer.walletAddress);
}

// Filter params:
// {
//   customerId?: string;    — filter by Paylix customer ID
//   status?: "pending" | "confirmed" | "failed";
//   metadata?: Record<string, string>;  — AND match on metadata keys
//   limit?: number;         — 1-100 (default 100)
// }
//
// Returns: PaymentSummary[]
// Each entry:
// {
//   id: string;
//   amount: number;
//   fee: number;
//   status: "pending" | "confirmed" | "failed";
//   txHash: string | null;
//   chain: string;
//   token: string;
//   productId: string;
//   fromAddress: string | null;
//   toAddress: string | null;
//   metadata: Record<string, string>;
//   livemode: boolean;
//   createdAt: string;
//   customer: {
//     id: string;
//     email: string | null;
//     firstName: string | null;
//     lastName: string | null;
//     walletAddress: string | null;
//   };
// }
```

### paylix.getPayment(id)

Retrieves a single payment by ID, including the embedded customer object.

```typescript
const payment = await paylix.getPayment("pay_abc123");
console.log(payment.status, payment.customer.email);
// Returns: PaymentSummary (same shape as listPayments entries)
```

### paylix.listSubscriptions(params?)

Lists subscriptions for the authenticated organization. Same filtering
as listPayments: customer ID, status, and metadata. Every result includes
an embedded `customer` object.

```typescript
// Active subscriptions only
const active = await paylix.listSubscriptions({ status: "active" });

// Find subscriptions by your own user ID stored in metadata
const userSubs = await paylix.listSubscriptions({
  metadata: { userId: "user_123" },
});

// Access customer info
for (const sub of active) {
  console.log(sub.productName, sub.customer.email, sub.nextChargeDate);
}

// Filter params:
// {
//   customerId?: string;
//   status?: SubscriptionStatus;
//   metadata?: Record<string, string>;
//   limit?: number;
// }
//
// Returns: SubscriptionSummary[]
// Each entry:
// {
//   id: string;
//   status: SubscriptionStatus;
//   subscriberAddress: string;
//   networkKey: string;
//   tokenSymbol: string;
//   onChainId: string | null;
//   intervalSeconds: number | null;
//   nextChargeDate: string | null;
//   trialEndsAt: string | null;
//   pausedAt: string | null;
//   productId: string;
//   productName: string;
//   metadata: Record<string, string>;
//   livemode: boolean;
//   createdAt: string;
//   customer: {
//     id: string;
//     email: string | null;
//     firstName: string | null;
//     lastName: string | null;
//     walletAddress: string | null;
//   };
// }
```

### paylix.getSubscription(id)

Retrieves a single subscription by ID, including the embedded customer object.

```typescript
const sub = await paylix.getSubscription("sub_abc123");
console.log(sub.status, sub.customer.email);
// Returns: SubscriptionSummary (same shape as listSubscriptions entries)
```

### paylix.getCustomerPortal(params)

Returns a customer's payment history and subscriptions.

```typescript
const portal = await paylix.getCustomerPortal({
  customerId: "cust_xyz", // required
});
// Returns:
// {
//   customer: Customer;
//   payments: Payment[];
//   subscriptions: Subscription[];
// }
```

### paylix.createPortalSession(params)

Creates a signed, time-limited URL to the hosted customer portal.

```typescript
const { url } = await paylix.createPortalSession({
  customerId: "cust_xyz", // required
});
// Redirect your user to `url`
```

### paylix.listCustomerInvoices(params)

Lists all invoices issued to a customer, with hosted URLs and PDF download links.

```typescript
const { invoices } = await paylix.listCustomerInvoices({
  customerId: "cust_xyz", // required
});
// Returns: { invoices: CustomerInvoice[] }
// Each invoice:
// {
//   id: string;
//   number: string;           — e.g. "INV-000042"
//   totalCents: number;
//   subtotalCents: number;
//   taxCents: number;
//   taxLabel: string | null;  — e.g. "VAT 20%"
//   currency: string;
//   issuedAt: string;
//   emailStatus: "pending" | "sent" | "failed" | "skipped";
//   hostedUrl: string;        — public HTML page
//   invoicePdfUrl: string;    — on-demand PDF download
//   receiptPdfUrl: string;    — on-demand receipt PDF
// }
```

### Customer Management

```typescript
// Create a customer
const customer = await paylix.createCustomer({
  email: "alice@example.com",         // optional
  firstName: "Alice",                  // optional
  lastName: "Smith",                   // optional
  walletAddress: "0xabcd...",          // optional
  country: "US",                       // optional
  taxId: "US123456",                   // optional
  metadata: { plan: "pro" },           // optional
});

// Get customer with payments, subscriptions, invoices
const detail = await paylix.getCustomer("cust_xyz");
// Returns: { customer, payments, subscriptions, invoices }

// Update customer
const updated = await paylix.updateCustomer("cust_xyz", {
  email: "newemail@example.com",
});

// List all customers
const customers = await paylix.listCustomers();

// Soft-delete a customer
await paylix.deleteCustomer("cust_xyz");
```

### Product Management

```typescript
// Create a product
const product = await paylix.createProduct({
  name: "Pro Plan",                    // required
  type: "subscription",                // required — "one_time" | "subscription"
  billingInterval: "monthly",          // for subscriptions — "weekly" | "biweekly" | "monthly" | "quarterly" | "yearly"
  prices: [{                           // required — at least one price
    networkKey: "base-sepolia",
    tokenSymbol: "USDC",
    amount: "1000",                    // in token units (1000 = 10.00 USDC)
  }],
  trialDays: 14,                       // optional — free trial
  taxRateBps: 2000,                    // optional — 20% tax
  taxLabel: "VAT 20%",                 // optional
  metadata: {},                        // optional
});

// Get, update, list
const product = await paylix.getProduct("prod_abc123");
const updated = await paylix.updateProduct("prod_abc123", { name: "Pro Plan v2" });
const products = await paylix.listProducts();
```

### Webhook Management

```typescript
// Create a webhook endpoint (secret is only returned once)
const hook = await paylix.createWebhook({
  url: "https://example.com/webhooks/paylix",  // required
  events: ["payment.confirmed", "subscription.created"], // required
});
console.log("Secret:", hook.secret); // Save this!

// List all webhooks
const hooks = await paylix.listWebhooks();

// Get a single webhook
const hook = await paylix.getWebhook("wh_abc123");

// Update webhook (all fields optional)
await paylix.updateWebhook("wh_abc123", {
  url: "https://example.com/v2/webhooks",
  events: ["payment.confirmed"],
  isActive: false,
});

// Delete a webhook
await paylix.deleteWebhook("wh_abc123");
```

### webhooks.verify(params)

Verifies a webhook signature. Returns true if the signature is valid.

```typescript
import { webhooks } from "@paylix/sdk";

const isValid = webhooks.verify({
  payload: rawBody,                              // required — raw request body as string
  signature: req.headers["x-paylix-signature"],  // required — signature header
  secret: "whsec_...",                           // required — webhook secret from dashboard
});
// Returns: boolean
```

### Test Faucet

```typescript
// Mint test USDC on Base Sepolia (test mode only)
const { txHash, amountMinted } = await paylix.testFaucet({
  address: "0xabcd...",  // required — wallet to mint to
  amount: 10000,         // optional — amount in token units (default varies)
});
```

## Webhook Events

All webhooks are POST requests with JSON body and an `x-paylix-signature` header.
The body envelope uses `event` (not `type`) as the event name key.

### payment.confirmed

Sent when a one-time payment is confirmed on-chain.

```json
{
  "event": "payment.confirmed",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-10T18:23:05.166Z",
  "livemode": true,
  "data": {
    "paymentId": "1f23991d-...",
    "checkoutId": "d2a27cbf-...",
    "productId": "911da752-...",
    "customerId": "anon_0x82A9...a2de",
    "amount": 1000,
    "fee": 5,
    "currency": "USDC",
    "chain": "base",
    "txHash": "0xfea3...d4c2",
    "fromAddress": "0x82A9...a2de",
    "toAddress": "0xAeB3...8934",
    "metadata": { "orderId": "42" }
  }
}
```

### subscription.created

Sent when a subscription is created and first payment confirmed.

```json
{
  "event": "subscription.created",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-10T18:23:05.166Z",
  "livemode": true,
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "3a1f...",
    "onChainId": "17",
    "checkoutId": "d2a2...",
    "productId": "911d...",
    "customerId": "anon_0x82A9...a2de",
    "amount": 2000,
    "currency": "USDC",
    "chain": "base",
    "interval": 2592000,
    "subscriberAddress": "0x82A9...a2de",
    "merchantAddress": "0xAeB3...8934",
    "txHash": "0xfea3...d4c2",
    "metadata": { "orderId": "42", "plan": "pro" }
  }
}
```

Note: `interval` is the charge period in **seconds**, not a string like "monthly".
A 30-day subscription is `2592000`.

### subscription.charged

Sent when a recurring charge is processed.

```json
{
  "event": "subscription.charged",
  "timestamp": "2026-05-10T18:23:05.166Z",
  "livemode": true,
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "3a1f...",
    "onChainId": "17",
    "paymentId": "8c44...",
    "amount": 2000,
    "fee": 10,
    "txHash": "0xabc1...ef02",
    "nextChargeDate": "2026-06-09T18:23:05.166Z",
    "metadata": { "orderId": "42", "plan": "pro" }
  }
}
```

### subscription.past_due

Sent when a recurring charge fails (insufficient balance, allowance exhausted, etc.).

```json
{
  "event": "subscription.past_due",
  "timestamp": "2026-05-10T18:23:05.166Z",
  "livemode": true,
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "3a1f...",
    "onChainId": "17",
    "status": "past_due",
    "metadata": { "orderId": "42", "plan": "pro" }
  }
}
```

### subscription.cancelled

Sent when a subscription is cancelled.

```json
{
  "event": "subscription.cancelled",
  "timestamp": "2026-05-10T18:23:05.166Z",
  "livemode": true,
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "3a1f...",
    "onChainId": "17",
    "status": "cancelled",
    "metadata": { "orderId": "42", "plan": "pro" }
  }
}
```

### invoice.issued

Sent when an invoice is created.

```json
{
  "event": "invoice.issued",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-11T18:23:05.166Z",
  "livemode": true,
  "data": {
    "invoiceId": "8b2c...",
    "invoiceNumber": "INV-000042",
    "paymentId": "1f23...",
    "customerId": "cust_xyz",
    "totalCents": 1200,
    "subtotalCents": 1000,
    "taxCents": 200,
    "taxLabel": "VAT 20%",
    "currency": "USDC",
    "hostedUrl": "https://paylix.example.com/i/abc...",
    "invoicePdfUrl": "https://paylix.example.com/i/abc.../pdf",
    "receiptPdfUrl": "https://paylix.example.com/i/abc.../receipt",
    "metadata": { "orderId": "42" }
  }
}
```

### invoice.email_sent

Sent after the invoice email is delivered successfully.

```json
{
  "event": "invoice.email_sent",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-11T18:23:08.011Z",
  "data": {
    "invoiceId": "8b2c...",
    "invoiceNumber": "INV-000042",
    "to": "customer@example.com"
  }
}
```

### invoice.email_failed

Sent when the mailer fails to deliver an invoice email.

```json
{
  "event": "invoice.email_failed",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-11T18:23:08.011Z",
  "data": {
    "invoiceId": "8b2c...",
    "invoiceNumber": "INV-000042",
    "to": "customer@example.com",
    "error": "SMTP 550: mailbox full"
  }
}
```

### system.relayer_balance_low

Sent when the gasless relayer wallet ETH balance drops below threshold.

```json
{
  "event": "system.relayer_balance_low",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-10T18:23:05.166Z",
  "data": {
    "address": "0xC7beA00CfCFb3f93AE8555d1a9E1Ec3018F281F9",
    "balanceWei": "800000000000000",
    "balanceEth": "0.0008",
    "thresholdWei": "1000000000000000"
  }
}
```

### system.keeper_balance_low

Sent when the subscription keeper wallet ETH balance drops below threshold.

```json
{
  "event": "system.keeper_balance_low",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-10T18:23:05.166Z",
  "data": {
    "address": "0x950d809e392FA0f080318d896c80472531f01907",
    "balanceWei": "750000000000000",
    "balanceEth": "0.00075",
    "thresholdWei": "1000000000000000"
  }
}
```

## Webhook Handler Examples

### Next.js App Router

```typescript
// app/api/webhooks/paylix/route.ts
import { webhooks } from "@paylix/sdk";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const payload = await req.text();
  const signature = req.headers.get("x-paylix-signature")!;

  const isValid = webhooks.verify({
    payload,
    signature,
    secret: process.env.PAYLIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET!,
  });

  if (!isValid) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid signature" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const webhook = JSON.parse(payload);

  switch (webhook.event) {
    case "payment.confirmed":
      await fulfillOrder(webhook.data.productId, webhook.data.customerId);
      break;
    case "subscription.created":
      await activateSubscription(webhook.data.subscriptionId);
      break;
    case "subscription.charged":
      await recordCharge(webhook.data.subscriptionId, webhook.data.amount);
      break;
    case "subscription.past_due":
      await handlePastDue(webhook.data.subscriptionId);
      break;
    case "subscription.cancelled":
      await revokeAccess(webhook.data.subscriptionId);
      break;
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}
```

### Express

```typescript
import express from "express";
import { webhooks } from "@paylix/sdk";

const app = express();

app.post(
  "/api/webhooks/paylix",
  express.raw({ type: "application/json" }),
  (req, res) => {
    const payload = req.body.toString();
    const signature = req.headers["x-paylix-signature"] as string;

    const isValid = webhooks.verify({
      payload,
      signature,
      secret: process.env.PAYLIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET!,
    });

    if (!isValid) {
      return res.status(401).json({ error: "Invalid signature" });
    }

    const webhook = JSON.parse(payload);
    // Handle webhook.event ...
    res.json({ received: true });
  }
);
```

## Common Patterns

### Create Checkout and Redirect (Next.js Server Action)

```typescript
"use server";
import { Paylix } from "@paylix/sdk";
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";

const paylix = new Paylix({
  apiKey: process.env.PAYLIX_SECRET_KEY!,
  network: "base",
  backendUrl: process.env.PAYLIX_BACKEND_URL!,
});

export async function buyProduct(productId: string, customerId: string) {
  const { checkoutUrl } = await paylix.createCheckout({
    productId,
    customerId,
    successUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/success`,
    cancelUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/pricing`,
  });
  redirect(checkoutUrl);
}
```

### Create Subscription

```typescript
export async function subscribe(productId: string, customerId: string) {
  const { checkoutUrl } = await paylix.createSubscription({
    productId,
    customerId,
    successUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/welcome`,
    cancelUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/pricing`,
  });
  redirect(checkoutUrl);
}
```

### Verify Payment Server-Side

```typescript
// app/api/verify/route.ts
import { Paylix } from "@paylix/sdk";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";

const paylix = new Paylix({ /* config */ });

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const paymentId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get("paymentId");
  if (!paymentId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing paymentId" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const result = await paylix.verifyPayment({ paymentId });

  if (result.verified) {
    return NextResponse.json({ status: "confirmed", txHash: result.txHash });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ status: result.status });
}
```

### Gate Content Behind Payment

```typescript
import { Paylix } from "@paylix/sdk";

const paylix = new Paylix({ /* config */ });

export async function hasActiveSubscription(customerId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const subs = await paylix.listSubscriptions();
  return subs.some(
    (sub) => sub.customerId === customerId && sub.status === "active"
  );
}
```

### Programmatic Webhook Setup

```typescript
const paylix = new Paylix({ /* config */ });

// Create webhook endpoint
const hook = await paylix.createWebhook({
  url: "https://example.com/webhooks/paylix",
  events: ["payment.confirmed", "subscription.created", "subscription.cancelled"],
});

// Store the secret securely — it's only returned on creation
await saveToVault("PAYLIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET", hook.secret);

// Later: disable during maintenance
await paylix.updateWebhook(hook.id, { isActive: false });

// Re-enable
await paylix.updateWebhook(hook.id, { isActive: true });
```

## Network Configurations

```typescript
import { NETWORKS } from "@paylix/sdk";

// Base Mainnet
NETWORKS["base"] = {
  chainId: 8453,
  name: "Base",
  rpcUrl: "https://mainnet.base.org",
  usdcAddress: "0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913",
  explorerUrl: "https://basescan.org",
};

// Base Sepolia (Testnet)
NETWORKS["base-sepolia"] = {
  chainId: 84532,
  name: "Base Sepolia",
  rpcUrl: "https://sepolia.base.org",
  usdcAddress: "0x...",  // MockUSDC contract
  explorerUrl: "https://sepolia.basescan.org",
};
```

## TypeScript Types

```typescript
// Configuration
interface PaylixConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  network: "base" | "base-sepolia";
  backendUrl: string;
}

// Checkout
interface CreateCheckoutParams {
  productId: string;
  customerId?: string;
  successUrl?: string;
  cancelUrl?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
  networkKey?: string;
  tokenSymbol?: string;
}

interface CreateCheckoutResult {
  checkoutUrl: string;
  checkoutId: string;
}

// Subscription
interface CreateSubscriptionParams {
  productId: string;
  customerId?: string;
  successUrl?: string;
  cancelUrl?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
  networkKey?: string;
  tokenSymbol?: string;
}

interface CreateSubscriptionResult {
  checkoutUrl: string;
  checkoutId: string;
  trialEndsAt: string | null;
}

interface CancelSubscriptionParams {
  subscriptionId: string;
}

interface UpdateSubscriptionWalletParams {
  subscriptionId: string;
  newWallet: string;
}

type SubscriptionStatus =
  | "active"
  | "past_due"
  | "cancelled"
  | "expired"
  | "trialing"
  | "trial_conversion_failed";

// Embedded customer info on list results
interface CustomerInfo {
  id: string;
  email: string | null;
  firstName: string | null;
  lastName: string | null;
  walletAddress: string | null;
}

// Payment list filters
interface ListPaymentsParams {
  customerId?: string;
  status?: "pending" | "confirmed" | "failed";
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;  // AND match: metadata[key]=value
  limit?: number;                     // 1-100 (default 100)
}

// Payment
interface PaymentSummary {
  id: string;
  amount: number;
  fee: number;
  status: "pending" | "confirmed" | "failed";
  txHash: string | null;
  chain: string;
  token: string;
  productId: string;
  fromAddress: string | null;
  toAddress: string | null;
  metadata: Record<string, string>;
  livemode: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
  customer: CustomerInfo;
}

// Subscription list filters
interface ListSubscriptionsParams {
  customerId?: string;
  status?: SubscriptionStatus;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
  limit?: number;
}

// Subscription
interface SubscriptionSummary {
  id: string;
  status: SubscriptionStatus;
  subscriberAddress: string;
  networkKey: string;
  tokenSymbol: string;
  onChainId: string | null;
  intervalSeconds: number | null;
  nextChargeDate: string | null;
  trialEndsAt: string | null;
  pausedAt: string | null;
  productId: string;
  productName: string;
  metadata: Record<string, string>;
  livemode: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
  customer: CustomerInfo;
}

// Payment Verification
interface VerifyPaymentParams {
  paymentId: string;
}

interface VerifyPaymentResult {
  verified: boolean;
  amount: number;
  fee: number;
  txHash: string;
  chain: string;
  customerId: string;
  productId: string;
  status: "confirmed" | "pending" | "failed";
  metadata: Record<string, string>;
  livemode: boolean;
}

// Customer
interface CreateCustomerParams {
  firstName?: string;
  lastName?: string;
  email?: string;
  walletAddress?: string;
  country?: string;
  taxId?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
}

interface Customer {
  id: string;
  customerId: string;
  organizationId: string;
  email: string | null;
  firstName: string | null;
  lastName: string | null;
  phone: string | null;
  walletAddress: string | null;
  country: string | null;
  taxId: string | null;
  source: string;
  metadata: Record<string, string>;
  deletedAt: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
}

// Product
interface CreateProductParams {
  name: string;
  description?: string;
  type: "one_time" | "subscription";
  billingInterval?: "minutely" | "weekly" | "biweekly" | "monthly" | "quarterly" | "yearly";
  prices: Array<{
    networkKey: string;
    tokenSymbol: string;
    amount: string;
  }>;
  trialDays?: number;
  trialMinutes?: number;
  taxRateBps?: number | null;
  taxLabel?: string | null;
  reverseChargeEligible?: boolean;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
}

// Webhook Management
interface Webhook {
  id: string;
  organizationId: string;
  url: string;
  events: string[];
  isActive: boolean;
  livemode: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
  secret?: string;   // only returned on creation
}

interface CreateWebhookParams {
  url: string;
  events: string[];
}

interface UpdateWebhookParams {
  url?: string;
  events?: string[];
  isActive?: boolean;
}

// Invoice
interface CustomerInvoice {
  id: string;
  number: string;
  totalCents: number;
  subtotalCents: number;
  taxCents: number;
  taxLabel: string | null;
  currency: string;
  issuedAt: string;
  emailStatus: "pending" | "sent" | "failed" | "skipped";
  hostedUrl: string;
  invoicePdfUrl: string;
  receiptPdfUrl: string;
}

// Customer Portal
interface CustomerPortalResult {
  customer: Customer;
  payments: Payment[];
  subscriptions: Subscription[];
}

// Webhook Verification
interface WebhookVerifyParams {
  payload: string;
  signature: string;
  secret: string;
}

// Webhook Event Envelope
interface WebhookEvent {
  event: string;      // e.g. "payment.confirmed"
  timestamp: string;
  livemode?: boolean;
  data: Record<string, unknown>;
}

// Network
interface NetworkConfig {
  chainId: number;
  rpcUrl: string;
  paymentVaultAddress: string;
  subscriptionManagerAddress: string;
  usdcAddress: string;
  basescanUrl: string;
}

type WebhookEventType =
  | "payment.confirmed"
  | "subscription.created"
  | "subscription.charged"
  | "subscription.past_due"
  | "subscription.cancelled"
  | "invoice.issued"
  | "invoice.email_sent"
  | "invoice.email_failed"
  | "system.relayer_balance_low"
  | "system.keeper_balance_low";
```

## Key Concepts

- **Amounts**: All amounts are in USDC cents (integer). 1000 = $10.00 USDC.
- **API Keys**: `pk_` prefix for publishable (client-side), `sk_` prefix for secret (server-side).
- **Networks**: `"base"` for mainnet, `"base-sepolia"` for testnet.
- **Non-custodial**: Payments go directly to the merchant wallet. Paylix never holds funds.
- **Webhook secrets**: `whsec_` prefix. Always verify signatures server-side.
- **Webhook envelope**: Uses `event` (not `type`) as the event name key, plus `timestamp`, `livemode`, and `data`.
- **Subscriptions**: Use ERC-20 `approve` + on-chain keeper pattern. No off-chain card storage.
- **Gasless**: Merchants and subscribers pay no gas. The Paylix relayer submits transactions on their behalf.
- **Test mode**: Use `sk_test_` keys. Test-mode data is isolated. Higher rate limits for development.
